findings.detail: Top-level imports: TYPE_CHECKING for MarketMindConfig, plus init_gateway from gateway, run_pre_gate1 from pipeline.pre_gate1, run_post_gate1 from pipeline.post_gate1. Lazy imports inside function bodies: gate1_interaction, session (SessionManager, SessionState, GateCheckpoint), session_context, layer1-3_interactive, decision_interactive. All imports follow glue → module direction. pre_gate1 and post_gate1 do NOT back-import from orchestration (confirmed via grep). Clean DAG.

run_daily() (line 32-36): state = await run_pre_gate1(...) → return await run_post_gate1(config, state, ...). Clean data handoff — the state dict produced by pre_gate1 is passed directly to post_gate1 with no transformation or key modification. run_full() (line 39-81): same pattern with Gate 1 insertion between pre and post. Both pre_gate1 and post_gate1 use the same 9-key contract.

run_daily(config, mock=False, verbose=False, shadow_count=None) → int. run_full(config, mock=False, verbose=False, shadow_count=None, session_mode='full') → int. run_gate1_mode(config, mock=False, verbose=False, shadow_count=None) → int. run_interactive(config, mock=False, verbose=False, shadow_count=None) → int. All return int for exit code. All accept same first 4 params. run_full adds optional session_mode. Signature compatibility maintained with pre-extraction versions.

run_daily() unchanged in behavior — calls run_pre_gate1 (was _run_stages_0_3) + run_post_gate1 (was _run_stages_4_10). Same sequential flow: Stages 0-3 → Stages 4-10. 4 smoke tests pass: test_run_daily_still_importable, test_run_full_function_exists, test_run_gate1_mode_function_exists, test_interactive_full_flow_confirm. app.py imports unchanged (line 70-71).

run_full() (lines 39-81): Inserts Gate 1 between pre_gate1 and post_gate1. run_gate1_mode() (lines 84-132): Runs pre_gate1 + Gate 1 only, no post_gate1. Both save GateCheckpoint via SessionManager with same data format (selected_direction, rejected_directions). Both handle empty hypotheses gracefully (skip Gate 1, proceed to post or exit). Clean additive pattern — Gate 1 is inserted, not mutated into, the pipeline.

run_interactive() (lines 135-172) uses a separate interactive path (SessionContext + layer1-3_interactive + decision_interactive). Does NOT use pre_gate1 or post_gate1 modules. This is intentional — the interactive path has its own stage-by-stage CLI prompt flow. No conflict with the batch pipeline path.

All 4 run modes have explicit return statements. run_daily: sequential call → return. run_full: conditional Gate 1 → call → return. run_gate1_mode: conditional Gate 1 → return. run_interactive: sequential interactive stages with early-return on skip (returns 0). No while loops, no recursion, no unbounded concurrency.

File at 173 lines (was 516 before extraction). Well under the 200-line glue soft threshold and the 300-line hard ceiling. The extraction successfully moved ~340 lines of business logic into pre_gate1.py and post_gate1.py. Remaining content is purely coordination: imports, CLI IO helpers, 4 run-mode functions.

notes: Successful extraction from 516-line monolith to 173-line coordinator + two focused modules. The DAG is clean: orchestration → pre_gate1, orchestration → post_gate1, with no back-imports. Data flow through the state dict is consistent across boundaries. All 4 entry points preserved with compatible signatures. Smoke tests pass. run_interactive uses its own interactive path (not pre/post modules) — this is intentional and documented.
